hooks.command: set -o pipefail; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; "$root/.codex/scripts/edited-files-from-hook.sh" | while IFS= read -r f; do case "$f" in *.json) case "$f" in /*) target="$f";; *) target="$root/$f"; [ -f "$target" ] || target="$PWD/$f";; esac; [ -f "$target" ] || continue; out=$(python3 -m json.tool "$target" 2>&1 >/dev/null) || { printf 'JSON 校验失败：%s\n%s\n' "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac; done

command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 || { printf 'shellcheck 未安装，跳过 shell 脚本校验。
' >&2; exit 0; }; set -o pipefail; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; "$root/.codex/scripts/edited-files-from-hook.sh" | while IFS= read -r f; do case "$f" in *.sh) case "$f" in /*) target="$f";; *) target="$root/$f"; [ -f "$target" ] || target="$PWD/$f";; esac; [ -f "$target" ] || continue; out=$(shellcheck "$target" 2>&1) || { printf 'shellcheck 告警：%s
%s
' "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac; done
